input.command:
echo "🔍 TESTING PERIOD FILTERING:"
echo ""
echo "Testing Today's data:"
curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/savings?period=today" | jq '{total_waste: .data.total_waste_cost, total_saved: .data.total_saved_cost}'
echo ""
echo "Testing Month's data:"
curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/savings?period=month" | jq '{total_waste: .data.total_waste_cost, total_saved: .data.total_saved_cost}'
echo ""
echo "Testing Year's data:"
curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/savings?period=year" | jq '{total_waste: .data.total_waste_cost, total_saved: .data.total_saved_cost}'

state.title: Test different period filters
